'''Kaell''' was the original [[Khomm/Legends|Khomm]] politician that started the [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] lineage that would later include [[Kaell 115]] and [[Kaell 116]].

==Appearances==
*[[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] {{1stm}}
